chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry & Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho. Const. Petition No. D – 4913 of 2024 [Shahzad Sultan v. Governor State Bank of Pakistan and others] Petitioner: Shahzad Sultan son of Malik Umar Sultan through Mr. Muhammad Qutub-uz-Zaman, Advocate. Date of hearing: 22-11-2024 Date of order: 22-11-2024 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – 1-3] Counsel for the Petitioner is not able to explain the grievance of the Petitioner. The memo of petition is also vague. From the documents annexed to the petition, it appears that pursuant to an agreement with a foreign person, an amount was remitted from abroad to the Petitioner’s account in Bank Al-Habib Limited and the said Bank requires certain regulatory compliances from the Petitioner. The writ sought is therefore against a private Bank which is not a person within the meaning of Article 199 of the Constitution of Pakistan. The petition is therefore dismissed as not maintainable. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
